Premed.Note: Granisetron 2 mg p.o. / Ondansetron 8 mg v 100 ml FR i.v. Dexametazón 12 mg i.v. Pantoprazol 40 mg p.o. HYDRATÁCIA: FR 1000 ml + KCl 20 mEq i.v. pred cisplatinou.

Instructions.Name: Cisplatin
Instructions.Inst: (každých 50 mg) v 500 ml NaCl 0,9% i.v., po každom vaku Manitol 10% 250 ml i.v.

_source: Williams SD et al. NEJM 1987;316:1435; Einhorn LH et al. NEJM 2007;357:340; eviQ BEP
